23 Jackson Driessen

23 Jackson Driessen

  • Ht./Wt.:
    6-2 / 185
  • Year:
    Freshman
  • Hometown:
    Lino Lakes, Minn.
  • High School:
    Centennial HS
  • Summary
  • Media
  • Season
  • Career

Summary

Biography

Concordia Career
2025-26: Appeared in two games for the Golden Bears in his freshman campaign ... recorded one steal agsint Wayne State (2/7). 

Centennial High School: Averaged 23 points, six rebounds, and four assists while shooting 50% from the field ... earned academic all-state honors ... named all-conference .... named team captain and MVP ... helped his team to a section 7AAA runner-up as a senior. 

Personal: Has one older sister ... plans to major in business at CSP.
No stats available for the current season.
